completion_summary: Completed candidate vNext method fairness controls: runner-enforced cumulative resource ledgers, 40-experiment/20-seed/checkpoint protocol, manifest-derived eligibility, evidence digests, suite resource_usage v0.2, and explicit classic/RL/live-LLM blockers. Formal comparisons remain closed until P0 and missing adapters are complete.
scope: Define and enforce a candidate vNext method fairness contract across classical, RL, and live LLM agents: experiment/checkpoint parity, wall-time/compute/model-call/token/cost ledgers, prompt/model provenance, fail-closed resource accounting, and a machine audit of current method eligibility without running pre-freeze formal comparisons.
